messages.speaker: Guide NPC
messages.text: Hi! Welcome to the BRNTalk demo conversation.

messages.speaker: Guide NPC
messages.text: This line auto-advances so you can test chained messages.

messages.speaker: {player}
messages.text: Great, I can see player-style bubbles in the chat-like UI.

messages.speaker: item.minecraft.iron_sword
messages.text: This message tests the auto i18n replacement. The speaker's name uses translation key "item.minecraft.iron_sword", which should be "Iron Sword" in your language.

messages.speaker: Guide NPC
messages.text: Next message is a WAIT node, the conversation should stuck. Resume it when ready.

messages.speaker: System
messages.text: (Conversation paused. Resume this thread with "/brntalk resume @s test_demo" to continue.)

messages.speaker: Guide NPC
messages.text: Nice! The WAIT node resumed correctly.

messages.speaker: Guide NPC
messages.text: This is a longer paragraph for quick UI checks: line wrapping, bubble height, and scrollbar behavior. If your screen rendering is correct, this message should remain easy to read without clipping.

messages.speaker: Guide NPC
messages.text: Demo complete. You should receive 64 diamonds as a small reward.

messages.speaker: System
messages.text: Test finished. Close the UI or press ESC to exit.
